title: About
content:
Our Factory & Manufacturing Capabilities

Xiamen Chic Homeware is a wooden products factory in China, specializing in OEM and private label manufacturing for global brands, importers, wholesalers, and distributors.

Our manufacturing base is located in Cao County, Shandong, a well-known wooden products production region in China.

The factory focuses on OEM and private label wooden product manufacturing for export markets, with in-house production covering material processing, assembly, finishing, and packaging.

 

Wooden Products Factory in China – Factory Overview

Our factory operates dedicated production areas for cutting, assembly, sanding, finishing, and packaging. Each production step is handled by experienced workers to ensure stable output and consistent quality.

Manufacturing Process

Our standard OEM production process includes:

  • Inquiry & requirement review
  • Sample development & approval
  • Material selection & preparation
  • Mass production
  • Quality inspection
  • Packing & export shipping

Materials & Semi-Finished Products

We work with a range of materials including paulownia wood, pine wood, acacia wood, bamboo, and engineered wood options.

Semi-finished products are inspected before entering the next production stage to ensure structural accuracy and material consistency.

Learn more about our custom wooden products here.

Quality Control

As a wooden products factory in China,Quality control is integrated throughout our production process, from material inspection to final packaging.

Each order is checked for dimensions, surface finishing, structure stability, and packaging integrity to meet export standards required by international markets.

Our production follows international export standards commonly required by overseas markets.

We operate our own wooden box factory in China, supporting OEM and private label projects for global buyers.

Export Packaging & Shipping

We provide export-ready packaging solutions based on customer requirements, including inner protection, carton packing, and palletization when needed.

Our team supports international shipping coordination for markets such as North America, Europe, the UK, and Australia.

Explore our OEM wooden product categories.

Why Choose Us

Experienced OEM & Private Label Manufacturer

We are a wooden products factory in China with practical experience in OEM and private label manufacturing for brands, importers, wholesalers, and distributors. From product development to export packaging, we support projects with a clear and efficient production process.

Wide Product Range for Different Markets

Our factory produces a broad range of wooden homeware, storage products, desk organizers, gift boxes, and retail packaging solutions. This allows us to support different product categories, market styles, and price levels in one supply system.

Flexible Customization Options

We support custom size, structure, color, logo, insert, and packaging requirements based on your product and brand positioning. Whether you need a simple wholesale model or a more premium private label solution, we can develop the right option for your market.

Material & Finish Choices

We work with different wood materials and engineered wood options to match different budgets and product needs. Surface finishing, color matching, logo methods, and hardware details can also be adjusted according to your project requirements.

Quality Control Throughout Production

Quality control is integrated into each production stage, from material inspection and semi-finished product checking to final assembly and packing inspection. We focus on structure, finish, dimensions, and packaging quality to support stable export orders.

Export Packaging Support

We provide export-ready packaging solutions based on product type and shipping method. Inner protection, carton packing, labeling, and palletization can be arranged according to customer requirements to help reduce transit risk.

Efficient Sampling & Order Follow-Up

Our team supports sample development, order follow-up, and production communication with a practical B2B workflow. We aim to make the sampling and ordering process clearer, faster, and easier for overseas buyers.

Long-Term Supply for Wholesale Projects

We focus on building stable cooperation with wholesale buyers and brand customers. With consistent production management and clear communication, we support repeat orders and long-term OEM business for international markets.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions here.
Q1: What kind of products do you manufacture?

We specialize in designing and manufacturing a wide range of high-quality wooden organizers and premium packaging solutions. Our core product lines include:

  • Wooden Desk & Office Organizers (e.g., pen holders, monitor stands, desk trays)

  • Wooden Beauty & Cosmetic Organizers (e.g., jewelry boxes, cosmetic brush holders, vanity trays)

  • Kitchen & Dining Wooden Storage (e.g., knife blocks, utensil caddies, spice boxes)

  • Premium Gift & Brand Packaging Boxes (e.g., watch boxes, wine boxes, ring boxes, gift set packaging)

  • Fitness & Wellness Wooden Products (e.g., yoga accessory organizers, gear storage)
    We are experts in working with materials like Acacia Wood, Pine Wood, Rubber Wood, Walnut, and Bamboo.

Are you a factory or a trading company?

We are a manufacturing factory with our own production facilities. We have full control over the entire process from wood sourcing, CNC machining, sanding, assembly, to finishing and quality control. You are welcome to visit our factory.

What are your main services? (OEM/ODM/OBM)

Our primary service is OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturing) and ODM (Original Design Manufacturing).

  • OEM: We can expertly produce according to your provided designs, samples, or technical drawings.

  • ODM: You can share your concept or target market, and our design team can develop unique products for you. We can provide custom design, material selection, and prototyping services.

  • We do not focus on our own branded (OBM) sales in your market, ensuring we are your dedicated manufacturing partner without competition.

What is your MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity)?

Our standard MOQ is 300 pieces per item, per design. However, we are flexible and can discuss lower MOQs for initial sample orders or simpler products. For larger projects, we offer more competitive pricing.

Can I put my own logo or brand on the products?

Absolutely. Custom branding is our specialty. We offer various logo application methods including laser engraving, hot stamping, silk screening, and branded labels. We will work with you to choose the best technique for your design and material.

Can I customize the product's size, material, color, and interior?

Yes, customization is at the heart of our service. You can customize:

  • Dimensions & Size

  • Wood Type & Finish (stain, paint, natural oil)

  • Interior Fabric & Layout (velvet, felt, foam inserts, compartments)

  • Hardware (color of clasps, hinges)

  • Packaging (individual poly bags, carton boxes, retail-ready packaging)
    We will provide a detailed quotation based on your specific requirements.

What is your sample policy?

We encourage sample orders to verify quality before bulk production.

  • Sample Lead Time: 7-15 days after confirmation.

  • Sample Cost: You pay the sample cost and shipping. This cost can often be deducted from your first bulk order.

  • Custom Samples: For custom designs, we provide 3D renderings for approval before physical sampling.

What is your typical production lead time?

For standard orders, our lead time is 30-45 days after sample confirmation and deposit payment. Lead times may vary based on order quantity, complexity, and production schedule. We always provide a clear timeline upfront.

How do you ensure product quality?

 Quality is embedded in our process:

  1. Incoming QC: Strict inspection of raw materials.

  2. In-Process QC: Checks at each production stage (cutting, sanding, assembly).

  3. Pre-Shipment QC: Final 100% inspection against approved samples and specifications before packing.

  4. We can provide QC reports and accommodate third-party inspections if required.

What are your payment terms?

 Our standard payment terms are:

  • 30% deposit to commence production.

  • 70% balance before shipment, after approval of pre-shipment photos.

  • For long-term partners, we can discuss more flexible terms like T/T 30% deposit, 70% against BL copy.

Where do you ship to, and what are the shipping terms?

We have extensive experience shipping globally via sea (FOB, CIF/CNF) and air (EXW, DAP). We work with reliable freight forwarders and will recommend the most cost-effective and efficient shipping solution based on your destination and needs.

How can I start a project with you?

Simply contact us with:

  1. Your product concept, sketches, or reference images.

  2. Your target specifications (material, size, quantity, budget).

  3. Your intended market and timeline.
    We will respond within 24 hours with a professional consultation and a clear path forward.

Have more questions?

If you have additional questions that are not covered in our FAQ, feel free to reach out. We're here to help and provide any information you may need.

Contact Us

title: Wooden Serving Tray
content:
Wooden Serving Trays & Platters: The Perfect Addition to Your Home and Business

Elevate your hospitality or retail collection with our premium Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays. From classic round acacia platters to functional bamboo trays with clear lids, we manufacture food-safe, stylish solutions for global brands. Our trays are designed not just for functionality but also to enhance the aesthetic appeal of your serving experience, making every occasion special.

1. Why Choose Our Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays?

In the world of home decor and hospitality, plastic is out, and nature is in. Wooden Serving Trays are no longer just functional items for carrying drinks; they are essential decor elements for coffee tables, ottomans, and kitchen islands. For retailers and F&B brands, stocking high-quality wooden platters offers a high-margin product that appeals to eco-conscious consumers.

As a premier Wooden Serving Tray Manufacturer in China, Xiamen Chic Homeware helps you capitalize on this trend. We don't just cut wood; we engineer durable, food-safe, and aesthetically stunning serving solutions tailored for the global market.

2. Material Guide: Acacia vs. Bamboo vs. Walnut

Choosing the right wood is crucial for your target market. Here is a breakdown of the materials we offer:

  • Acacia Wood (Best Seller): Known for its high density and distinctive grain patterns. It ranges from rich dark browns to golden honey tones. It is naturally water-resistant and antimicrobial, making it the top choice for Cheese Boards and Charcuterie Platters.

  • Bamboo (Eco-Friendly): Technically a grass, bamboo is harder than maple and incredibly sustainable. It offers a uniform, clean blonde look. Our Bamboo Serving Trays are lightweight, affordable, and perfect for high-volume retail or promotional gift sets.

  • Rubberwood & Pine: Excellent budget-friendly options. While softer, they are perfect for painted finishes or rustic "farmhouse" style trays where a distressed look is desired.

3. Factory Insights: How We Ensure Quality

Importing wooden products can be risky if the manufacturer doesn't understand wood science. Here is how we prevent common issues like warping and cracking:

  • Moisture Content Control: We strictly dry our lumber to 8-12% moisture content before production. This ensures the tray stays flat even when shipped from humid China to dry climates like Arizona or Northern Europe.

  • Food-Safe Finishes: Safety is non-negotiable. All our serving trays are finished with FDA and LFGB-compliant oils, waxes, or varnishes. Whether it's a matte oil finish for a natural feel or a high-gloss lacquer for easy cleaning, we ensure it's safe for direct food contact.

  • Precision Sanding: A rough tray feels cheap. We employ a multi-step sanding process, finishing with fine-grit sandpaper to ensure every handle, corner, and surface is silky smooth to the touch.

4. Versatile Designs for Every Occasion

Our catalog features diverse structures to meet different buyer needs:

  • The Ottoman Tray: Large, rectangular trays with high sides and sturdy cutout handles. Built to hold heavy coffee pots or serve breakfast in bed.

  • The Party Platter: Featuring our innovative Divided Bamboo Trays with Clear Lids. These are game-changers for outdoor catering, picnics, or keeping snacks fresh and pest-free.

  • Seasonal Shapes: From Christmas tree-shaped dishes to heart-shaped Valentine's platters, we have the molds ready to boost your Q4 sales.

5. Customization & OEM Services

Stand out from the competition with our branding options:

  • Laser Engraving: Burn your logo into the tray center or handle for a permanent brand mark.

  • Custom Color: We can stain wood to match "Walnut," "Cherry," or "Black Oak" tones to fit your collection's color palette.

  • Retail Packaging: We design color sleeves, gift boxes, or PDQ displays to maximize shelf appeal.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

What is the MOQ forcustom Wholesale Wooden Serving Trays？

For standard items, our MOQ is typically 500 pieces. However, for first-time partners, we are flexible and can support trial orders to test your market.

How do I clean and maintain wooden serving trays?

We recommend hand washing with mild soap and warm water. Never soak the wood or put it in the dishwasher. To maintain the luster, wipe the tray with food-grade mineral oil once a month. We can include a “Care Instruction Card” in your packaging.

Do your trays pass food safety tests?

Yes. We can provide SGS, Intertek, or TUV test reports verifying that our finishes are lead-free, BPA-free, and safe for food contact according to FDA (USA) and LFGB (EU) standards.

Can you handle DDP shipping to Amazon FBA?

Absolutely. We have extensive experience shipping to FBA warehouses in the US, UK, and Canada. We handle labeling, palletizing, and customs clearance so you don’t have to worry about logistics.

title: Materials Guide
content:
Materials Guide

This material guide is created by our factory team to help brands and importers choose the right wood for custom wooden boxes, trays, and other wooden home products.

Acacia Wood

Acacia wood is one of the top wood materials for kitchenware, favored for its durability and beauty.

Acacia wood is a durable hardwood with rich natural grain patterns.
It is widely used for wooden plates, serving trays, cutting boards, and kitchen organizers.

Key advantages:

  • Strong and durable structure

  • Natural color variation for premium appearance

  • Suitable for food-contact products with proper finishing

Acacia wood is one of the most popular choices for mid-range to premium kitchenware markets.

Bamboo

Bamboo is one of the choice wood materials for kitchenware, ideal for eco-conscious consumers.

Bamboo is an eco-friendly and fast-growing material commonly used in kitchen storage, trays, and organizers.

Key advantages:

  • Sustainable and environmentally friendly

  • Stable structure and smooth surface

  • Cost-effective for mass production

Bamboo products are especially popular in European and North American markets.

Pine Wood

Pine wood is a popular selection among wood materials for kitchenware due to its affordability.

Pine wood is a lightweight and economical solid wood option.
It is commonly used for wooden boxes, storage trays, and home organizers.

Key advantages:

  • Cost-effective for larger-sized products

  • Easy to process and customize

  • Suitable for painted or natural finishes

Pine wood is ideal for volume orders and price-sensitive markets.

Walnut Wood

Walnut wood stands out as one of the finest wood materials for kitchenware, known for its elegance.

Walnut wood is a premium hardwood known for its dark color and elegant grain.

Key advantages:

  • High-end appearance

  • Strong and durable

  • Ideal for premium and gift products

Walnut wood is suitable for customers targeting high-end markets.

Oak Wood

Oak wood is another robust choice among wood materials for kitchenware, perfect for premium products.

Oak wood is a strong and durable hardwood used for premium trays, boards, and furniture-style organizers.

Key advantages:

  • Excellent durability

  • Classic natural grain

  • Long service life

Oak wood products are positioned for higher-end markets.

Beech Wood

Beech wood is favored as wood materials for kitchenware, providing a smooth finish for various products.

Beech wood has a fine and even grain with good hardness.
It is often used for wooden plates, trays, and household items.

Key advantages:

  • Smooth surface and uniform color

  • Strong and durable hardwood

  • Suitable for food-contact use

Beech wood is popular for clean, minimalist product designs.

Rubber Wood

Rubber wood is increasingly popular as one of the sustainable wood materials for kitchenware available.

Rubber wood is an environmentally friendly hardwood made from recycled rubber trees.

Key advantages:

  • Stable structure

  • Light natural color

  • Sustainable wood source

It is commonly used in kitchenware and home organization products.

MDF

MDF is often used as a budget-friendly alternative among wood materials for kitchenware.

MDF is an engineered wood material widely used in budget-oriented storage and organizer products.

Key advantages:

  • Smooth surface for painting or laminating

  • Consistent quality

  • Lower material cost

MDF allows flexible designs and decorative finishes at competitive prices.

Plywood

Plywood is a versatile choice among wood materials for kitchenware, blending strength and flexibility.

Plywood is made from multiple layers of wood veneer, offering good strength and stability.

Key advantages:

  • Strong structure

  • Cost-effective

  • Can be finished with veneer, laminate, or paper wrap

It is commonly used for wooden storage boxes and organizers.

Paulownia Wood

Paulownia wood is also recognized as a lightweight option among wood materials for kitchenware.

Paulownia wood is extremely lightweight and widely used for storage boxes, gift boxes, and decorative organizers.

Key advantages:

  • Very light weight

  • Good cost performance for large products

  • Popular for bulk production

It is a preferred material for wooden box products where size and shipping cost matter.

SAPELE WOOD

Sapele wood is a cost-effective yet attractive option among wood materials for kitchenware.

Sapele wood is a tropical hardwood commonly used as a cost-effective alternative to mahogany.

Key advantages:

  • Good strength and stability

  • Attractive reddish-brown color

  • Moderate price compared to premium hardwoods

Sapele wood is widely used for wooden plates and trays due to its balance of cost and appearance.

TEAK WOOD

Teak wood is known for its excellent durability and natural resistance to moisture.

 

Teak wood contains natural oils that help reduce water absorption and improve stability in humid environments.

Key advantages:

  • Excellent moisture resistance

  • High durability and stability

  • Warm golden-brown color

Teak wood is widely used for wooden cutting boards, trays, and premium storage boxes where long-term performance is required.

How to Choose the Right Materia for Your Product

Choosing the right wood material depends on the product type, target market,and price positioning. Below are general guidelines based on our manufacturingexperience:

Wooden Plates & Serving Trays

Designed for food-contact products that balance durability with natural appearance.

√Acacia Wood √Bamboo √Beech Wood √Sapele Wood

Wooden Storage / Gift Boxes

Best suited for lightweight storage, gift packaging, and decorative box applications.

√Acacia Wood √Bamboo √Paulownia Wood √Pine Wood √Plywood √MDF

Premium Products

Best wood material for wooden storage boxes?

Best wood for food-contact kitchenware?

What is the most durable wood for premium wooden products?

What Is a Wooden Sofa Tray?

A wooden sofa tray is a functional home accessory designed to sit securely on a sofa armrest, providing a stable surface for drinks, snacks, remote controls, and personal items.

Compared with plastic or metal alternatives, wooden sofa trays offer a warmer appearance, better durability, and improved stability for everyday use.

Popular styles include sofa arm trays, sofa organizer trays with compartments, and sofa trays with phone or tablet slots, which are widely used in living rooms, apartments, and hospitality settings.

Materials Used for Wooden Sofa Trays

Multiple material options to meet different market positions and budget needs

Learn more about sustainable bamboo materials from the World Bamboo Organization.

Bamboo

Best for: Daily heavy use and cold beverages.

 The Knowledge:

Bamboo is a dense, grass-based fiber that is naturally more water-resistant than traditional hardwoods.

The Sofa Benefit:

This is the perfect "spill-proof" choice for those who love iced drinks. It won’t warp or crack from condensation, ensuring your couch stays dry and your tray stays flat for years.

Acacia Wood

Best for: High-end interior styling and durability.

The Knowledge:

Acacia is a dense, oily hardwood famous for its rich, contrasting "Tiger-stripe" grain.

The Sofa Benefit:

It’s almost impossible to scratch. If you have kids or pets, Acacia’s incredible hardness stands up to daily wear and tear while adding a high-end, custom-built look to your living room.

.

Pine Wood

Best for: Cozy farmhouse vibes and natural scents.

 The Knowledge:

Pine features prominent knots and a soft, straight grain that tells a story of the forest.

The Sofa Benefit:

It brings a warm, "hygge" feel to your space. While it’s the most budget-friendly solid wood option, its natural resin gives off a subtle, relaxing scent that makes your movie night feel even cozier.

Paulownia Wood

Best for: Expensive leather sofas and delicate fabrics.

 The Knowledge:

Often called the "Aluminum of Timber," Paulownia has an incredibly low density but high strength-to-weight ratio.

The Sofa Benefit:

At nearly 40% lighter than pine, this tray is designed to protect. It provides a stable surface without leaving permanent "pressure dents" or crushing the soft foam of your luxury sofa armrests.

Multiple wood options available to match different markets, price levels, and branding needs.
